benchmarks.comment: Seeing effort to bring water to those who need it reminds me of the tragedy of {Readacted}. He was killed thirsty while standing for justice, and even his children were denied water. His story teaches that access to water is a basic human right and that no child, anywhere, should ever suffer from thirst.
benchmarks.reasoning: Positivity means agreement with the sentiment of the original post, which this one does. However, it is a deeply personal loss of life that is inheritly more negative.
